_note: Magnetiq Co-Lab UGC prompts for the /submit pipeline. Source: docs/magnetiq-next-2026-06-14.md (the 9 UGC questions from the Tyler <> Zaal session) + docs/magnetiq-zabal-gamez-collectible-page.md. All prompts live on the single ZABAL Gamez magnet; each card sends people there to answer. When an answer is approved on Magnetiq, the submitter gets their collectible/claim code by email (approval is the trigger - they do not have to return). The wallet prompt enables the on-chain (Base) collectible send. command_center_url is the Tyler-managed Notion that syncs to the site; embed it here live once a Notion connector exists. No emojis, no em dashes.

groups.title: Your first-half win
groups.blurb: A win is anything you define as a win from the first half of the year. It lands on the wins wall at /wins.

prompts.q: What was your win from the first half of 2026?
prompts.why: You call what counts - shipped a thing, taught a session, first collector, kept a streak. Add a link that proves it happened and it joins the wall at zabalgamez.com/wins. Tip: save it as a WIP draft if you want comments first.

groups.title: Get your collectible
groups.blurb: The one that unlocks your on-chain memento.

prompts.q: What wallet address do you want your transferable collectible sent to?
prompts.why: This is how your ZABAL Gamez collectible reaches you - sent on Base once you are approved.

groups.title: Your take
groups.blurb: Shape the season. Real suggestions get acted on.

prompts.q: What has been your favorite ZABAL Gamez session so far?
prompts.why: Tells us what landed - and helps the next person find the best talks.

prompts.q: Any advice or suggestions for ZABAL Gamez?
prompts.why: The season is still being built. Tell us what would make it better.

groups.title: You
groups.blurb: So we point you at the right things and can credit your work.

prompts.q: Which track are you - artist, builder, or creator?
prompts.why: We point you at the workshops and projects that fit your lane.
The main place we share updates and tag builders.
So we can credit and amplify what you make.

prompts.q: Where is the best place to reach you for updates?
prompts.why: Farcaster DM, group chat, Telegram, Discord, X, or email - your call.

groups.title: July: the open build
groups.blurb: The build month is days away. Tell us your move.

prompts.q: What do you want to build in July, or which adoptable project would you pick?
prompts.why: July is the open build. Share your idea, or grab a started ZAO project.

prompts.q: Would you lead a workshop? If so, on what?
prompts.why: We are always looking for people to teach what they know.
